  The Meeting Sales Script Part 2. {Social Media/Content Services}

So I魹ｽm assuming that you want to make more revenue?


Great, would you agree that marketing is the way that you魹ｽll be able to do that?


Great, so here are your options. You could run a billboard ad, zero feedback or sign of ROI. You could run a TV ad, zero feedback or sign of ROI. You could hand out flyers, zero feedback or sign of ROI. You could do any of those, or you could use social media marketing where you魹ｽll know exactly how many people have been reached locally, how many new fans you have monthly and how these fans are interacting with you online.


Let me ask you something, what running shoes do you have?


Okay, so here魹ｽs the thing. Nike (or whichever shoe they mentioned) didn魹ｽt run an advert to you about the shoes and then you bought it. People buy for one of three reasons, direct outreach, convenience or brand awareness. Let me explain - direct outreach is the old school model of marketing where you run an advert like a magazine advert or a billboard advert and people actually buy from that. Convenience is when I want sushi and I walk down the street and theres a Sushi place so I walk in. They魹ｽve never run an advert to me before, they魹ｽve never built a brand, they just happen to be there. Lastly, there魹ｽs brand awareness. Brand awareness is why you bought your shoes. It魹ｽs why I bought my computer, I bought my Desktop computer because it魹ｽs an Apple, not because they ran an advert to me trying to draw me in for that product. Brand awareness is the future of marketing.


Before we move on, I just want to make sure this makes sense?


Okay, so if you were going to run a google Adwords campaign, they would cost you $2-$4 on average. That魹ｽs $2-$4 to have someone reach your website, possibly take action but most likely魹ｽ leave and never come back. You can compare this to what I do, where I build my clients social media and build up their tribe of true fans via Facebook and Instagram. For the same price they would get a click on Google, I would get them a fan on their social media. The best part? Once this fan is ours, it costs zero to run adverts to, we魹ｽre constantly in front of them on social media and they魹ｽre constantly being reminded of the fact that your 魹ｽx魹ｽ is the place to be.


Anyways, I don魹ｽt want to overwhelm you. So, really the only thing you need to remember is this - Based off of what you told me: You want to grow your business, you魹ｽre not happy with how much you魹ｽre making now, you understand that marketing is the only way you魹ｽre going to do that and lastly, I think it魹ｽs pretty clear that you social media is the way to do this.


Do you have any questions?


DRAW OUT THE GAP

So you want to get from where you are here at 魹ｽx魹ｽ and you want to get to 魹ｽx魹ｽ. This gap is made possible with my help. Now, my fee for all of this is 魹ｽx魹ｽ per month and a $1,000 setup fee but I have found that those who make decisions quickly always turn out to be the best clients. So for that reason, I have action based pricing where if you make a decision with me here today, I waive the $1,000 set up fee.
